errors.hcp_invalid: Handicap index must be a number between -10 and 54.0.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.heading: Complete your profile
onboarding.subheading: Tell us a bit about yourself and you're ready to play.
onboarding.nicknameHint: Optional — the name your playing partners know you by
onboarding.genderHint: Used to suggest the right tee and calculate your course handicap correctly.
onboarding.levelHint: Junior unlocks junior tees when available. Senior is an info tag for now.
onboarding.hcpGolfboxHelper: The number you have in Golfbox right now

home.notifyOnOpen: We'll notify you when the scorecard opens.
home.teeArriveEarly: Be on the 1st tee 10 minutes before the start.
home.draftBanner: Draft — admin is still planning. Details may change.
home.pendingApprovals: {count, plural, one {1 player in your flight is waiting for approval} other {# players in your flight are waiting for approval}}
home.soloIndividual: Individual format. You play for yourself, no team.
home.withdrawnHeading: You have withdrawn from the game
home.withdrawnBody: Your scores don't count in the standings. You can undo this while the game is active.
home.finishGameHint: You organised this game. Lock it and open the leaderboard for everyone.
home.ctaSubmittedPendingApproval: Scorecard submitted — waiting for approval from someone in your flight.
home.ctaSubmittedApproved: Scorecard submitted and approved. Waiting for admin to finish the game.
home.incompleteSidesPart: side {side} needs {count, plural, one {1 player} other {# players}}
home.unassignedFlightBanner: {count, plural, one {1 player hasn't been assigned to a flight yet.} other {# players haven't been assigned to flights yet.}} The organiser will assign flights before the start.

waitingRoom.countdownBody: We'll notify you when the scorecard opens.
waitingRoom.notInFlight: You haven't been placed in a flight yet. Tap a flight to join.

errors.not_authed: You need to log in to choose a flight.
errors.not_member: You're not a participant in this game.
errors.game_not_scheduled: The game is no longer in the planning phase.
errors.flight_full: That flight just filled up. Choose another.
errors.db_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.db: Could not save your submission. Please try again.
errors.not_active: The game is not active — you can't submit right now.

submit.missingHolesBanner: {count, plural, one {1 hole is missing. If you submit now, it will be recorded as not played.} other {# holes are missing. If you submit now, they will be recorded as not played.}}
submit.confirmBase: Submit the scorecard? This cannot be undone without admin.
submit.confirmMissing: {count, plural, one {1 hole is missing and will be saved as not played.} other {# holes are missing and will be saved as not played.}}

errors.db: Could not save the change. Please try again.
errors.not_active: The game is not active — approval is not required right now.

banners.rejected: Scorecard rejected. The player has been notified.

approve.noPending: No scorecards are waiting for approval in your flight.
approve.rejectWithoutReasonConfirm: Reject {name} without a reason? Please add a brief explanation first.

finish.heading: Finish game
finish.subtitleSide: Choose side-tournament winners for «{name}». The game will be locked when you confirm.
finish.subtitlePlain: Lock «{name}» and open the leaderboard for everyone.
finish.missingCount: {count, plural, one {1 player hasn't submitted:} other {# players haven't submitted:}}
finish.missingNote: If you finish now, these players will be recorded as not submitted. Their scores still count in the results.
finish.unapprovedCount: {count, plural, one {Waiting for 1 scorecard to be approved:} other {Waiting for # scorecards to be approved:}}
finish.unapprovedNote: A co-player must approve each scorecard before you can finish. Ask them to open the game and approve, then you can finish here.
finish.explanationAllowWd: If you finish now, players without a tick will be recorded as not submitted. Scores they managed to enter still count. Players with a tick will be marked as Withdrawn and won't count in the standings. The rest will be locked and the leaderboard will open for everyone.
finish.explanationNoWd: If you finish now, these players will be recorded as not submitted. Scores they managed to enter still count. The rest will be locked and the leaderboard will open for everyone.
finish.allSubmittedNote: Everyone has submitted their scorecard. If you finish now, the game will be locked and the leaderboard will open for all participants.

delete.heading: Delete «{name}»?
delete.playerCount: {count, plural, one {1 player in the game} other {# players in the game}}
delete.scoreCount: {count, plural, one {1 score row} other {# score rows}}
delete.scheduledWarning: The game is scheduled and players have been invited. They won't be notified of the cancellation, so please let them know yourself.

errors.delete_failed: Delete failed. Please try again in a moment.

withdraw.heading: Withdraw from «{name}»?

errors.withdraw_failed: Could not withdraw you from the game. Please try again or contact the organiser.

withdraw.warningActive: You are withdrawing from an active game. Your scores won't count in the results and your scorecard will be locked. You can undo this while the game is active.
withdraw.warningPreStart: You will be removed from the sign-up list and your scorecard won't open at tee-off. The organiser will be notified automatically if you were on a team.

activeItems.scoresNotRanked: Your scores won't count in the standings
activeItems.cardLocked: Your scorecard will be locked for further entry
activeItems.shownAsWithdrawn: You will be shown as «Withdrawn» under the leaderboard

withdraw.activeNote: You can undo and resume from the start page while the game is active.

preStartItems.requestDeleted: Any pending join request will also be deleted
preStartItems.teamNotified: Team members and captain will be notified if you were on a team

withdraw.preStartNote: If you change your mind, you can sign up again as long as registration is still open.

edit.subtitle: Change course, players, teams or settings
edit.draftBanner: The game is still a draft — only you can see it. Fill in the missing details and publish when you're ready.
edit.scheduledBanner: The game is scheduled. Players will see changes the next time they open the app.

players.heading: Players
players.subtitle: Manage who's in «{name}».
players.approvalHint: If a co-player can't approve a scorecard, you can approve on behalf of the flight here. Then you can finish the game.
players.fullBanner: The game is full ({max} of {max}). Remove someone to invite more.

statusMessages.player_reinstated: Player is back in the game.

errorMessages.mail_failed: The invitation was saved but the email didn't go through.
